notes: Extended cases for moving the maximum value to the front.

cases.name: sample_move_max_to_front
expect_contains_all: The resulting linked list after moving largest stored value to the front of the list is: 70 30 20 40 50

cases.name: max_already_at_front_list_unchanged
expect_contains_all: The resulting linked list after moving largest stored value to the front of the list is: 90 20 30 40

cases.name: single_node_list_stays_same
expect_contains_all: The resulting linked list after moving largest stored value to the front of the list is: 5

cases.name: negative_numbers_still_move_largest_to_front
expect_contains_all: The resulting linked list after moving largest stored value to the front of the list is: -3 -10 -20 -7
